name: David Shawty
description: '''David Salazar''' (born September 21, 1999), known professionally as '''David Shawty''', is an American rapper and record producer known for pioneering the [[Internet rap|Internet]] [[Microgenre|microgenres]] [[digicore]] and [[glitchcore]]. In 2020, his song "[[Pressure (Yungster Jack and David Shawty song)|Pressure]]" with Yungster Jack went [[Viral video|viral]] online. They collaborated on the EP ''Stupid Fruity Swag'' in 2021. In 2022, Salazar released the solo album ''David 3''.
